checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Can the slotted_freezable mechanism for Header objects be bypassed?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Attempt to modify Header fields after freeze() is called. 2. Test __dict__ manipulation on frozen Header objects. 3. Try subclassing Header to bypass freeze mechanism. 4. Verify that all modification attempts raise appropriate errors.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-17, Trust Boundary: tb-005. Internal-only reachability but high impact if bypassed.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are all 21 header fields validated before block acceptance?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Craft blocks with zero/default values for computed fields (base_fee_per_gas, requests_hash, blob_gas_used). 2. Submit via P2P and verify rejection. 3. Test each of the 21 header fields individually with missing/default values. 4. Verify block validation detects and rejects incomplete headers.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-18, Trust Boundary: tb-005. Bug bounty eligible - PoC requires block with zero-valued computed field being accepted.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is base_fee_per_gas independently recomputed per EIP-1559?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with incorrect base_fee_per_gas (not matching EIP-1559 formula). 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block is rejected. 4. Test boundary cases where parent gas_used is at limits. 5. Verify the adjustment formula is applied correctly.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-19, Trust Boundary: tb-005. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is blob gas accounting validated per EIP-4844 under Fusaka rules?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with incorrect blob_gas_used or excess_blob_gas. 2. Test with Fusaka-specific blob gas parameters. 3. Verify rejection of blocks with invalid blob gas values. 4. Test edge cases at the new Fusaka blob gas limits.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-20, Trust Boundary: tb-005. Fusaka-specific - higher risk of implementation inconsistencies.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is requests_hash validated per EIP-7685 under Fusaka?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with incorrect requests_hash. 2. Submit via P2P under Fusaka rules. 3. Verify block rejection. 4. Test EIP-7685 computation rules are correctly implemented. 5. Verify requests_hash is independently computed, not trusted from header.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-21, Trust Boundary: tb-005. Fusaka-specific EIP - high priority.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are non-empty ommers rejected in post-merge blocks?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct post-merge Osaka block with non-empty ommers list. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify body-level validation rejects the block. 4. Confirm both header (ommers_hash) and body (ommers tuple) validation occurs.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-23, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Data smuggling risk via ommer fields.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are all 5 transaction types decoded without type confusion?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct blocks with each transaction type (Legacy, AccessList, FeeMarket, Blob, SetCode). 2. Test mixed blocks with all types. 3. Verify no type confusion between Bytes and LegacyTransaction representations. 4. Test edge cases in transaction type detection.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-24, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is Withdrawal object immutability enforced after freeze()?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Create Withdrawal object and call freeze(). 2. Attempt to modify index, validator_index, address, and amount fields. 3. Verify all modification attempts raise errors. 4. Test __dict__ manipulation bypass attempts.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-25, Trust Boundary: tb-004. Internal reachability via Engine API.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are incomplete Withdrawal objects rejected during construction?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Attempt to construct Withdrawal with missing fields. 2. Test each field individually (index, validator_index, address, amount). 3. Verify construction errors are raised for incomplete objects. 4. Test default value handling.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-26, Trust Boundary: tb-004.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are withdrawal addresses and amounts type-validated?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify withdrawal address must be valid 20-byte Address. 2. Verify amount must be valid U256. 3. Test with invalid address lengths. 4. Test with amounts exceeding U256 bounds. 5. Confirm EL trusts but type-validates CL data.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-27, Trust Boundary: tb-004. CL trust assumption - EL does not verify withdrawal amounts.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is ETH credited only to addresses specified by CL?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Trace withdrawal processing code path. 2. Verify ETH is credited exactly to the address in each Withdrawal object. 3. Check for any address modification or substitution during processing. 4. Audit the withdrawal crediting function.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-28, Trust Boundary: tb-004. Requires CL compromise to exploit.

checklist.title: Is the bloom filter bytearray always exactly 256 bytes with no out-of-bounds access?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Review add_to_bloom function for bounds checking. 2. Craft transactions producing logs with adversarial addresses/topics. 3. Verify bloom bytearray is always 256 bytes. 4. Test for index values that could exceed [0, 255].
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-29. Bug bounty eligible - PoC must demonstrate out-of-bounds access.

checklist.title: Is the 11-bit mask (0x07FF) correctly applied in bloom bit computation?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify bit_to_set = Uint.from_be_bytes(hash[idx:idx+2]) AND 0x07FF. 2. Check for incorrect mask values (e.g., 0x0FFF). 3. Verify bit_to_set is always in [0, 2047]. 4. Test with hash values that would exceed bounds without proper masking.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-30. Incorrect mask causes consensus splits.

checklist.title: Is byte_index computation always in range [0, 255]?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify formula: bit_index = 0x07FF - bit_to_set, byte_index = bit_index // 8. 2. Test boundary cases where bit_to_set = 0 and bit_to_set = 2047. 3. Confirm byte_index always in [0, 255] given correct mask.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-31. Derived invariant from mask correctness.

checklist.title: Does add_to_bloom iterate exactly 3 times reading 2-byte pairs?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Review add_to_bloom loop structure. 2. Verify exactly 3 iterations reading indices (0, 2, 4). 3. Verify each iteration sets exactly one bit. 4. Check for off-by-one in loop bounds.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-32. Incorrect iteration count causes bloom divergence.

checklist.title: Is bloom filter initialized to 256 zero bytes before processing logs?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Review logs_bloom initialization code. 2. Check for buffer reuse without clearing. 3. Verify bloom is fresh 256 zero bytes before each computation. 4. Test for residual bits from previous computations.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-34. Memory optimization bugs could cause contamination.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is every log address added to bloom exactly once?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Trace bloom computation for receipts with multiple logs. 2. Verify each log address is processed exactly once. 3. Check for skipped addresses in edge cases. 4. Test with many logs in a single receipt.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-35, Trust Boundary: tb-008. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is every log topic added to bloom exactly once?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify add_to_bloom calls = (1 + len(log.topics)) per log. 2. Test logs with 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 topics. 3. Check for skipped topics. 4. Verify total bloom bit count matches expected.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-36, Trust Boundary: tb-008. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Is Bloom returned only after all logs are fully processed?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Review logs_bloom for early return paths. 2. Check for race conditions in log processing. 3. Verify bloom construction completes before return. 4. Test exception handling during log processing.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-37. Early return produces partial bloom.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is receipt bloom consistency with logs verified?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct receipt with bloom inconsistent with logs. 2. Submit block via P2P. 3. Verify bloom is recomputed and compared. 4. Confirm blocks with inconsistent blooms are rejected.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-38, Trust Boundary: tb-008. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is cumulative_gas_used monotonically non-decreasing?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with receipts where cumulative_gas_used decreases. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block rejection. 4. Test consecutive receipt pairs for monotonicity validation.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-40, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-003. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are logs with more than 4 topics rejected?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Review EVM LOG0-LOG4 opcode handlers. 2. Verify no opcode allows more than 4 topics. 3. Test for bugs in opcode handling that could produce excess topics. 4. Verify topic count validation during transaction execution.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-42, Trust Boundary: tb-003. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are oversized blocks rejected per EIP-7934?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct block exceeding EIP-7934 RLP size limit. 2. Verify early rejection before full deserialization. 3. Test boundary at exact size limit. 4. Measure resource consumption for oversized blocks.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-43, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is bloom bit arithmetic spec-compliant across implementations?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify exact formula: bit_to_set = Uint.from_be_bytes(hash[idx:idx+2]) AND 0x07FF. 2. Verify bit_index = 0x07FF - bit_to_set. 3. Verify byte_index = bit_index // 8. 4. Verify bit_value = 1 << (7 - (bit_index % 8)). 5. Cross-check against other client implementations.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-44, Trust Boundary: tb-008. CRITICAL - any deviation causes consensus split.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is bloom computation bounded by gas limits?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Craft transactions maximizing log output within gas limit. 2. Measure bloom computation time. 3. Verify O(n) complexity in total log entries. 4. Confirm gas limits bound computation.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-45, Trust Boundary: tb-008. Conditional scope - known design limitation.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is bloom keccak256 call count bounded?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Count keccak256 calls during max-log block processing. 2. Verify bound: (1 + max_topics_per_log) * max_logs_per_block. 3. Test at EIP-7825 and EIP-7934 limits.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-46, Trust Boundary: tb-008. Conditional scope - bounded by gas.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is gas_used <= gas_limit enforced?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with gas_used > gas_limit. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block rejection. 4. Test at exact boundary (gas_used == gas_limit).
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-49, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is header bloom verified against computed receipt blooms?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with header bloom != combined receipt blooms. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block rejection. 4. Test bloom combination logic across receipts.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-50, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-008. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is parent_hash validated against canonical chain?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with fabricated parent_hash. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block is rejected or deferred. 4. Test with parent_hash of orphaned/non-canonical blocks.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-51, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is timestamp > parent.timestamp enforced?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with timestamp <= parent.timestamp. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block rejection. 4. Test timestamp == parent.timestamp edge case.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-52, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is extra_data limited to 32 bytes?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with extra_data > 32 bytes. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block rejection. 4. Test at exactly 32 bytes and 33 bytes.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-53, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is block number == parent.number + 1 validated?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with incorrect block number. 2. Test number = parent.number (same). 3. Test number = parent.number + 2 (skip). 4. Verify all variants rejected.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-54, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is state_root verified after full block execution?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Construct valid-looking block with incorrect state_root. 2. Execute all transactions. 3. Verify state_root recomputation. 4. Confirm mismatch causes rejection.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-55, Trust Boundary: tb-001. CRITICAL - state_root bypass breaks consensus.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is trie root computation deterministic regardless of insertion order?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Create identical trie states with different insertion orders. 2. Compute root() for each. 3. Verify all roots are identical. 4. Test with large key sets and varied orderings.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0001, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - non-determinism causes network-wide consensus failure.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does patricialize terminate for all valid inputs?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify level parameter strictly increases on each recursive call. 2. Test with keys at maximum nibble length (64 for secured tries). 3. Check for infinite recursion conditions. 4. Test all trie modes (secured and unsecured).
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0002, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-008. CRITICAL - infinite recursion halts network.

checklist.title: Are default values excluded from trie._data (no ghost entries)?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Set key to non-default value, then set to default. 2. Verify key is removed from _data. 3. Check trie._data.keys() after deletion. 4. Verify no ghost entries in Merkle root computation.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0003. CRITICAL - ghost entries corrupt state root.

checklist.title: Does trie_get return the exact value set by trie_set?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Set various key-value pairs. 2. Get each key and verify exact value match. 3. Test with edge case values (empty, large, special characters). 4. Test unset keys return trie.default.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0004. CRITICAL - incorrect reads break EVM execution.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are secured trie keys always keccak256 hashed?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify _prepare_trie hashes keys when trie.secured=True. 2. Check for code paths bypassing key hashing. 3. Verify no raw keys appear in secured trie mapping. 4. Test for trie-balancing attack vectors.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0005, Trust Boundary: tb-007. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Does encode_node always produce non-empty output?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Test encode_node with all value types. 2. Verify assertion for v != b''. 3. Look for edge cases producing empty bytes. 4. Test with unusual Account, Transaction, Receipt values.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0006. Empty encoding crashes or corrupts trie.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is get_storage_root always invoked for Account encoding?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Trace Account encoding path. 2. Verify get_storage_root is called. 3. Test with newly created accounts. 4. Verify None return causes failure (not silent success).
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0007, Trust Boundary: tb-002. CRITICAL - missing storage root corrupts state.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does get_storage_root return correct canonical roots?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify storage root computation for various accounts. 2. Test accounts with empty storage (should return EMPTY_TRIE_ROOT). 3. Compare computed roots against known correct values. 4. Test edge cases triggering callback.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0008, Trust Boundary: tb-002. CRITICAL - incorrect storage root silently corrupts state.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is the 32-byte threshold in encode_internal_node exact?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Test with RLP encoding exactly 31, 32, 33 bytes. 2. Verify < 32 returns unencoded, >= 32 returns hash. 3. Check for off-by-one errors. 4. Cross-reference against Ethereum specification.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0010, Trust Boundary: tb-004, tb-005. CRITICAL - boundary error causes consensus split.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is RLP encoding deterministic and canonical?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Encode same input multiple times. 2. Verify bit-identical output. 3. Test with complex nested structures. 4. Compare against canonical RLP specification.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0011, Trust Boundary: tb-004. CRITICAL - non-canonical RLP breaks consensus.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is keccak256 deterministic and collision-resistant?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Hash same input multiple times. 2. Verify identical 32-byte output. 3. Verify against known keccak256 test vectors. 4. Check for library version/configuration issues.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0012, Trust Boundary: tb-005. CRITICAL - any inconsistency breaks all trie operations.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is keccak256 collision resistance maintained?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify 128-bit collision resistance is intact. 2. Monitor for cryptanalytic advances. 3. Test address collision scenarios (theoretical). 4. Confirm collision would allow state overwrites.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0013, Trust Boundary: tb-005, tb-007. CRITICAL - collision enables fund theft.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is encode_node type dispatch correct?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Test each type: Account, LegacyTransaction, Receipt, Withdrawal, U256, Bytes. 2. Verify correct dispatch path for each. 3. Test fallback to previous_trie.encode_node. 4. Check isinstance chain ordering.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0014, Trust Boundary: tb-003. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is previous_trie fallback encoding compatible?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify types that fall through to previous_trie. 2. Verify encoding produces non-empty bytes. 3. Check RLP-encodability of output. 4. Test cross-fork encoding consistency.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0015, Trust Boundary: tb-003. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Does copy_trie produce a fully independent copy?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Copy trie and modify the copy. 2. Verify original is unchanged. 3. Test with various value types. 4. Verify state snapshot/revert behavior.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0016. Failed transaction reverts would not work correctly.

checklist.title: Does trie_set correctly delete keys when value equals default?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Set key to value, then set to trie.default. 2. Verify key is absent from _data. 3. Test with storage slot zero (common deletion case). 4. Verify no ghost entry persists.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0018. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Is trie_set a no-op when deleting non-existent key?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Set non-existent key to trie.default. 2. Verify _data is unchanged. 3. Check root() before and after (should be identical). 4. Test with various key formats.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0019. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Does trie_get return trie.default for unset keys?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Get key that was never set. 2. Verify return value is exactly trie.default. 3. Test identity comparison (not just equality). 4. Test various key formats.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0020. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Are nibble values validated to be in range [0, 15]?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Check bytes_to_nibble_list output range. 2. Look for code paths bypassing nibble conversion. 3. Test nibble_list_to_compact with out-of-range values. 4. Verify bit masking guarantees.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0023. Conditional scope - normally guaranteed by bytes_to_nibble_list.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is compact encoding header byte correct?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Test even-length leaf (expect 0x20). 2. Test even-length extension (expect 0x00). 3. Test odd-length leaf (expect 0x3X). 4. Test odd-length extension (expect 0x1X). 5. Verify Merkle proof compatibility.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0024, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - incorrect header breaks proofs.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does empty trie produce EMPTY_TRIE_ROOT?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Create empty trie and compute root(). 2. Verify result equals keccak256(rlp.encode(b'')). 3. Test after deleting all entries from non-empty trie. 4. Verify newly created accounts have correct empty storage root.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0028, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - affects all accounts.

checklist.title: Does single-element trie produce correct LeafNode?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Create trie with single key-value. 2. Verify patricialize returns LeafNode. 3. Check key suffix matches key[level:]. 4. Test contracts with single storage slot.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0029. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Are ExtensionNodes correctly constructed for shared prefixes?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Create keys with common prefix. 2. Verify ExtensionNode key_segment equals shared prefix. 3. Verify subnode is recursive patricialize result. 4. Check level increment equals prefix length.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0030. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Are BranchNodes correctly constructed with 16 subnodes?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Create keys with no shared prefix at current level. 2. Verify BranchNode has exactly 16 subnodes. 3. Verify each subnode contains only keys with matching nibble. 4. Test key distribution correctness.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0031. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Is Account/Receipt/Uint rejected at BranchNode value position?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify conditions where len(key) == level. 2. Test with Account/Receipt/Uint at this position. 3. Verify AssertionError is raised. 4. Test edge cases in secured tries.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0032. Conditional scope - unusual state configuration required.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does root() always return exactly 32 bytes?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Compute root() for various trie states. 2. Verify all results are exactly 32 bytes. 3. Test small tries where RLP < 32 bytes. 4. Verify correct hashing for small root nodes.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0033, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - non-32-byte root breaks headers.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are pathological trie structures prevented?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Test unsecured tries with crafted keys. 2. Measure depth/balance of resulting structures. 3. Benchmark root computation time. 4. Verify secured tries mitigate via key hashing.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0034, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-007. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are new types explicitly handled, not falling through?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Review isinstance chain for all expected types. 2. Verify no unintended fallthrough to previous_trie. 3. Test fork upgrade scenarios. 4. Check for new types added in Fusaka.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0035, Trust Boundary: tb-003. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is state growth bounded by gas costs?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Craft transactions maximizing state entries per gas. 2. Measure actual state growth vs gas spent. 3. Verify SSTORE/CREATE gas costs match spec. 4. Test root computation time bounds.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0038, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-006. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are small root nodes hashed to 32 bytes?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Create trie with minimal entries. 2. Verify root_node with RLP < 32 bytes is hashed. 3. Verify final root is 32 bytes. 4. Test various small trie configurations.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0040, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - short root breaks headers.

checklist.title: Does _prepare_trie process ALL entries in trie._data?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Count entries before and after _prepare_trie. 2. Verify no entries are skipped. 3. Check exception handling for potential silent failures. 4. Test with various value types.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0041. CRITICAL - skipped entries cause state loss.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are secured trie key collisions prevented?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify keccak256 collision resistance. 2. Test _prepare_trie output for key uniqueness. 3. Verify second entry would overwrite first on collision. 4. Confirm collision is computationally infeasible.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0042, Trust Boundary: tb-005, tb-007. CRITICAL - collision enables theft.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is root computation order-independent?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Test with different dict iteration orders (if possible). 2. Verify patricialize produces canonical structure regardless of order. 3. Compare roots from different orderings. 4. Test across Python versions.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0044, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - order-dependence causes splits.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are Accounts correctly routed through encode_node?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Trace Account encoding path in _prepare_trie. 2. Verify isinstance(value, Account) check. 3. Test with Account-like but non-Account objects. 4. Verify storage root is included for Accounts only.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0046, Trust Boundary: tb-002. CRITICAL - misclassification corrupts state.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is root() cross-implementation compatible?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Compare root() output against other Ethereum clients. 2. Test with known state configurations. 3. Run consensus test vectors. 4. Verify against official test suites.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0047, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - divergence breaks network.

checklist.title: Is LeafNode rest_of_key slice correct (key[level:])?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify LeafNode rest_of_key equals key[level:]. 2. Check for off-by-one in slice. 3. Test proof verification with generated LeafNodes. 4. Test at various tree depths.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0048. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is Address conversion correct in _prepare_trie?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify Address(preimage) conversion. 2. Check for truncation or extension of bytes. 3. Test with various preimage lengths. 4. Verify get_storage_root receives correct address.
checklist.notes: Source: PROP-0050, Trust Boundary: tb-002. Bug bounty eligible.
